pulse_items.title: Artemis II Crew Returns Safely to Earth
pulse_items.summary: NASA's Artemis II mission successfully concluded with splashdown in the Pacific Ocean. Viral images show astronauts smiling after 10-day lunar orbit mission, sparking renewed excitement for space exploration.

pulse_items.title: Pragmata Pre-Load Crashes Servers
pulse_items.summary: Capcom's highly anticipated sci-fi game Pragmata opened pre-loading today, causing immediate server crashes across all platforms. Reddit threads exploded with 50k+ comments in first hour as fans share frustration and excitement.

pulse_items.title: Microsoft Unveils Agentic AI Platform
pulse_items.summary: At Azure Summit, Microsoft announced 'Copilot Agents' - autonomous AI systems that can complete complex multi-step tasks. Early demos show agents booking travel, managing projects, and coding entire applications.

pulse_items.title: TikTok 'Moonwalk Challenge' Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: A dance trend combining Michael Jackson moves with zero-gravity simulation effects has exploded on TikTok. Over 2 million videos created in 24 hours, with creators using new AR filters to simulate floating.

pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'Quantum Heist' Breaks Records
pulse_items.summary: New sci-fi thriller 'Quantum Heist' became Netflix's most-watched series debut ever with 82 million hours viewed in first day. Social media flooded with theories about the time-travel plot twists.

pulse_items.title: Major Earthquake Hits Japan Coast
pulse_items.summary: 7.2 magnitude earthquake struck off eastern Japan coast, triggering tsunami warnings that were later lifted. Early reports indicate minimal damage but widespread social media panic.

pulse_items.title: 'AI Therapist' Meme Takes Over Discord
pulse_items.summary: Niche Discord communities are sharing screenshots of conversations with AI therapy bots giving absurd advice. The meme format shows increasingly unhinged 'therapy sessions' that users find hilarious.

pulse_items.title: Taylor Swift Announces 'Midnights' Re-Recording
pulse_items.summary: Taylor Swift surprised fans by announcing 'Midnights (Taylor's Version)' will drop next week. The announcement broke Spotify's single-day streaming record for announcement tracks.

pulse_items.title: NBA Playoffs Controversial Call Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: A last-second foul call in Lakers vs Warriors Game 1 has sparked massive debate. The video has 15M+ views on YouTube with analysts breaking down the controversial referee decision frame by frame.

pulse_items.title: Google Searches Spike for 'Solar Flare Effects'
pulse_items.summary: Search interest in solar flares and geomagnetic storms surged 850% after news of strong solar activity. People are searching for effects on electronics, health, and whether auroras will be visible.

pulse_items.title: Vegan Lab-Grown Salmon Hits US Markets
pulse_items.summary: First commercially available lab-grown salmon debuts in Whole Foods, selling out in hours. Food influencers are posting taste tests comparing it to wild-caught salmon with mixed reactions.

pulse_items.title: 4-Day Workweek Study Shows 40% Productivity Boost
pulse_items.summary: Major UK study reveals companies with 4-day workweeks saw productivity increase by 40% and employee satisfaction skyrocket. LinkedIn flooded with discussions about implementing similar policies.

pulse_items.title: '90s Fashion Revival Hits Gen Z
pulse_items.summary: Baggy jeans, butterfly clips, and platform shoes are making a major comeback among Gen Z. TikTok fashion creators are showing how to style vintage 90s looks with modern twists.

pulse_items.title: Crypto 'Sleep Mining' Trend Emerges
pulse_items.summary: New proof-of-stake protocol allows users to earn crypto rewards while their devices are idle overnight. Crypto Discord communities are sharing optimized setups and debating environmental impact.

pulse_items.title: Ancient Roman Villa Discovered Under London Pub
pulse_items.summary: Archaeologists uncovered remarkably preserved Roman villa foundations during renovations of a historic London pub. The discovery includes intact mosaics and has historians reevaluating Roman London's layout.
